title: reaumuria reflexa subsp. odonta
intro: Reaumuria reflexa subsp. odonta, also known as the desert broom or Chinese saltwort, is a shrubby halophyte that belongs to the family Chenopodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Reaumuria reflexa subsp. odonta include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throats, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
